title: Vulkanium
description: Optimizing modpack based on vulkan mod
body:
# Vulkanium
Optimization modpack based on [**Performium Reborn**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/performium-reborn) but with [**VulkanMod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod ), trying to replicate the ecosystem of [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), without Sodium. Especially useful on a potato PC

✅ Сompletely replaces

⚠️ Partially replaces

❌ No replaces

## Replacement progress
✅ [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) —> [**VulkanMod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod)

✅ [**Sodium Extra**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) —> [**VulkanMod Extra**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod-extra) / [**Not Enough Vulkan**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iuZL1bXB)

⚠️ [**Iris Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) —> [**Beryl**](https://modrinth.com/mod/beryl)

✅ [**Bobby**](https://modrinth.com/mod/M08ruV16) —> [**VulkanBobby**](https://modrinth.com/mod/i9PLM1kH) & [**Bobby**](https://modrinth.com/mod/M08ruV16)

❌ [**voxy**](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy)

❌ [**Distant Horizons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
